summary: Frontend-only testing of Wanger Family Hub PWA. Tested login, tab navigation, dark mode, More tab features, sign out, and Iris login. Core flows working. One significant UX issue: Made with Emergent badge blocks Chores and More tabs on 390x844 mobile viewport.

ui_bugs.issue: The 'Made with Emergent' badge (bottom-right fixed element) overlaps and intercepts pointer events for the Chores and More tabs in the bottom nav on 390x844 mobile viewport. Real users cannot click these tabs without the badge disappearing.

data-testid='display-name-input' not found. Display name appears as 'Tim >' suggesting an edit flow behind a click, not an inline input. If testid is required for testing, it needs to be on the edit trigger or edit input.

issues: Color swatches only show 6 options (no custom hex picker visible). This may be intentional.

action_items: HIGH: The Emergent badge covers Chores and More bottom nav tabs on mobile (390x844). Consider adjusting the badge position or z-index so it doesn't block bottom nav clicks. Real users will be unable to reach Chores and More tabs on mobile.
LOW: Confirm if data-testid='display-name-input' should be on the edit trigger button or the actual input field inside the edit modal/flow.
critical_code_review_comments: Emergent badge z-index/positioning blocks bottom nav interaction on mobile — critical for a mobile-first PWA
test_credentials: Tim: tmp.wanger@gmail.com / Fini63720 | Iris: irismelanie.wanger@gmail.com / Fini63720
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows pass. The main blocker for automated testing is the Emergent badge blocking Chores/More tabs — use JS dispatchEvent to click those tabs. Tim avatar is blue (#3B82F6), Iris avatar is rose (#F43F5E) - both verified. Dark mode toggle works (html.dark class applied). Sign Out redirects to login. Supabase auth is live and working.
passing_tests: Login page renders with email, password inputs and Sign In button
Tim login works — name 'Tim' and blue avatar (#3B82F6) shown in top bar
5 bottom nav tabs visible after login: Home, Shopping, Tasks, Chores, More
Each tab shows friendly empty state (no blank screens)
Dark mode toggle switches to dark theme (html class='dark')
More tab shows profile settings: 6 color swatches, display name section, Sign Out button
Sign Out logs out Tim and shows login page
Iris login works — name 'Iris' and rose avatar (rgb(244,63,94) = #F43F5E) shown
Iris color swatch shows rose as selected
